source_text: Once client_/server_application_traffic_secret_N+1 and its associated traffic keys have been computed, implementations SHOULD delete client_/server_application_traffic_secret_N and its associated traffic keys.
rule_statement: After computing traffic_secret_N+1, implementations SHOULD delete traffic_secret_N and its keys.
applies_when: New application traffic secret has been computed after key update
expected_value: old traffic secret and keys deleted
checkability_rationale: Internal memory management; cannot be verified externally.
